assets.prompt: Create a enemy sprite of briar-backed beetle predator with glowing amber core. hostile creature sprite for a top-down arena game, readable attack silhouette, visually distinct body shape, premium indie-game finish. modern high-detail pixel art, nuanced shading, crisp edges, visually rich but gameplay-readable, designed for a contemporary indie game. Style mode: topdown_asset. Output should hold up at 384x384 source resolution and still read clearly when scaled down in gameplay. Transparent or removable background. avoid chunky 8-bit nostalgia, avoid intentionally primitive low-detail treatment, avoid exaggerated CRT or old-console aesthetics.

Create an animated enemy sprite of briar beetle lane-pusher with amber shell plates and thorn legs. hostile lane-pushing creature for a top-down lane-defense game, readable attack silhouette, visually distinct body shape, premium indie-game finish. Render a cohesive low-framerate gameplay animation with consistent character volume, palette, and positioning across frames. Use the rd-animation style walking_and_idle. Each frame must keep the same subject identity, palette, and camera angle while showing one coherent gameplay action. Target frame size 48x48. No text, labels, borders, UI panels, or background scene dressing. modern polished pixel art, crisp readable silhouettes, consistent shading, and strong gameplay clarity. avoid muddy low-contrast frames, avoid random pose drift, avoid noisy background detail, avoid deliberately primitive 8-bit nostalgia.
